# Melut Basin

**Summary**: A sedimentary basin in Sudan.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2012]] focused on the basement reservoir within the Melut basin.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2012-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2012]] Rift and Sag phases identified

## Formations Present

- [[2012-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2012]] precambrian-basement

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Melut basin is one of several areas in Sudan where hydrocarbon-hosted fractured basement reservoirs have been reported. ([[2012-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2012, p. 11]])
